no: Must be installed after all content mods but before late-stage scripts and tools. Finalizes the EET installation.

ki.description: EET_End may fail with a fatal parsing error on BDABISHA.BCS.BAF. Root cause identified by argent77: Rogue Rebalancing v4.92 corrupts STATS.IDS with duplicate nonsense entries via outdated ds.tpa (Detectable Spells). WeiDU chokes on CheckStat() lookups against the corrupted IDS. Similar pattern to MiH Meta-Mod IDS corruption.
ki.workaround: Use Angel's Rogue Rebalancing fork instead of the original v4.92. If error persists without RR, check other mods with outdated ds.tpa libraries.

conflicts.reason: mih_metamod cleanup (cn:4) MAKE_BIFF of 139K files into 7.2GB bif corrupts IDS files (TRIGGER.IDS, AREATYPE.IDS). EET_end cannot parse the biffed IDS files and fails.

sum: Finalizes the EET installation after all other mods are installed. Must be the very last mod in your install order.
